chunks.title: Prayer for Deliverance
chunks.reason: A continuous plea to God for refuge and protection from enemies.

chunks.title: Description of Distress
chunks.reason: The psalmist describes physical and emotional suffering caused by adversaries.

chunks.title: Trust and Praise
chunks.reason: A declaration of trust in God's sovereignty followed by praise for His goodness.

chunks.title: Call to Courage
chunks.reason: A concluding reflection on God's hearing of prayer and a call for others to trust Him.
